message:
fix(config): wire RuConfig patch into ConfigPatch merge system

The RuConfig struct had a `merge(&mut self, patch: RuPatch)` method and
the RuPatch struct existed, but neither was connected to the config
loading system. This caused two compiler warnings about dead code.

Root cause: When RuConfig was added to the main Config struct, the
corresponding patch wiring was overlooked. Other config subsystems
(CacheConfig, UpdateConfig, RobotConfig, etc.) all follow the same
pattern and were correctly wired.

Changes:
- Add `pub ru: Option<RuPatch>` field to ConfigPatch struct
- Add merge call in Config::merge_patch() to apply ru patches

This enables users to override RuConfig settings (enabled, ru_path,
skill_repos, auto_index, parallel) via project-local config files,
matching the behavior of all other config subsections.

Verified: `cargo check` now produces zero warnings. All 54 config-related
tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
